'''''Challenge'' 44''' was a roleplaying magazine from June/July of [[1990]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including a rules supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Jet Packs]]" and was written by [[Stephen A. Marinaccio]].
